subcodes.first_line: We have indeed kindled the Lamp, sent down the verses, manifested the Cause, and caused all things to speak forth, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اوقدنا السراج و انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا الامر و انطقنا الاشیاء و القوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
